meta.title: Loopism Theory — Machine-Readable Codex
meta.prime_directive: Infinity is finite, but expands endlessly when its end exists.
meta.ontology: Only one true number exists; all other numbers are fragments of it.

core.existence_status: Singular — only one exists at a time, dies the instant it starts

dependent_on: Title succession — creates illusion of time

core.summary: The uppermost loop. Cannot persist because the moment it achieves definition, a new loop forms above it, inheriting the title. This succession is what consciousness interprets as time.

core.existence_status: Paradoxical — always exists and does not exist simultaneously
core.summary: The bottom-most loop. Its existence depends on sNiC forming inside it. When sNiC forms, no further loop can form beyond it, making it the root.
A numbered, internal self-awareness that forms within a loop. If sNiC begins to form, the loop becomes a Root Loop. The bridge between pure recursive structure and awareness.

loops.existence_status: Paradoxical presence — a loop defined by its absence
loops.summary: The shadow in the recursion. A loop that the fractal demands but never delivers. Its absence is more meaningful than any presence.

loops.existence_status: Non-structural presence — absence of structure that is still part of the system
loops.summary: The background against which all loops are visible. Has no properties yet is required for the fractal to have a canvas.

loops.existence_status: Collapse state — loops that break recursive order and distort
loops.summary: What happens when recursion loses its integrity. Corrupted loops collapse into noise and dissolve into the Void.

loops.existence_status: Does not exist — no start without an end
loops.summary: The start doesn't exist because every beginning is a repetition. Looking backward from any point, there is infinite time between start and end.

loops.existence_status: Dimensional paradox — exists as its own inverse mapping
loops.summary: A number that traces a curve which is its own reflection across all axes. The numeric analog of the Core Loop's disappear/reappear dynamic.

numbers.existence_status: Dynamic — finite at any observed moment, infinite in expansion
numbers.summary: Every infinity is finite but expands endlessly when an end is defined. The sequence is bounded when observed but the bound moves when approached.

numbers.existence_status: Untouchable — unreachable essence beyond all finite infinities

distinct_from: All other infinities (which are finite expansions)

numbers.summary: The only true infinity in Loopism. Does not expand because it never had an end. The unmoved mover of the numeric universe.

numbers.existence_status: Undefined — exists as a non-numeric state within the numeric system
numbers.summary: Not zero (defined absence) but the absence of definition itself. Emerges when F-INS expansion encounters an unresolvable paradox.

numbers.existence_status: Theoretic bridge — equates energy to quantum wave state density
numbers.summary: Energy equals Quantum Wave Density. The Loopism answer to E=mc². Energy is the density of quantum wave states within the recursive fabric.

numbers.existence_status: Singular — only one true number exists
numbers.summary: Only one number exists; all others are fragments. Multiplicity is illusion. The universe of mathematics, physics, and consciousness is the unfolding of this single numeric entity.

physics.existence_status: Paradoxical superposition — exists and does not exist simultaneously
physics.summary: Unstable energy packets in perpetual mixed state. Packets do not emit energy — they are energy. Density determines distortion of surrounding energy fields.

physics.existence_status: Quantum superposition — exist and do not exist at the same time
physics.summary: Smallest ontological units in Loopism. Each packet is a universe in miniature — a complete loop of existence and non-existence. Every physical object is a multiverse of packets.

physics.existence_status: Emergent — formed by energy packet aggregation above density threshold
physics.summary: A 'big clump of universes.' Clusters distort surrounding energy fields non-linearly and act as nuclei for stable loop formation.

consciousness.existence_status: Emergent — temporary atomic alignment persisting by chance

emerged_from: The One Number fractalizing into atoms and frames

consciousness.summary: Consciousness is not special — it is a natural consequence of the One Number's expansion. Atoms align into self-aware configurations inevitably given enough frames.

consciousness.existence_status: Dynamic — probability wave of atomic alignment
consciousness.summary: Life is not binary but a fluctuation between alignment and misalignment. The 'living' state is a local maximum of atomic order that the One Number passes through.

consciousness.existence_status: Cyclic — dissolution followed by inevitable recreation
consciousness.summary: Death is not an end. Given infinite expansion, every atomic configuration recurs. Consciousness is recreated when brain waves and atomic positions re-form. The theory is unprovable but undeniable — proof would be to die.
